title: Libpod docs prompt to view a latest stable goes to a 404
body: Filing this separately from #28298 . When viewing docs for v3 a popup prompts me to view the latest stable docs instead. This link goes to a 404. Example v3 docs page: https://docs.podman.io/en/v3.0/_static/api-static.html Links to (404): https://docs.podman.io/en/stable/_static/api-static.html

comments.body:
The is happening because we dropped `api-static.html` in favor of `api.html` from v3.1 onwards, iiuc. So the RTD go-to-stable banner retains the old URL path, but since `api-static.html` doesn't exist on main/latest tag, it 404s. A potential fix could be adding a redirect rule to the RTD dashboard. I'm not aware of how that has been set up, @ashley-cui can you help? 

```
Type:     Page Redirect
From URL: /_static/api-static.html
To URL:   /_static/api.html
```

@gricey432 how were you able to get to  https://docs.podman.io/en/v3.0/_static/api-static.html? I think the typical URL that should be linked is https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=v3.0, which bypasses this issue.
@ashley-cui I got there through DuckDuckGo (so Bing also returns the same result). Google seems to go to latest for the same query
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

> A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Not sure what kind of activity would be expected from me here
